---
title: "test"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(here)
```

```{r}
source(here("R/validate_bbox.R"))
```

## Valid bbox values test
```{r}
is_valid_bbox(c(-122, 37, -121, 38))
```

## Invalid bbox values test
```{r}
is_valid_bbox(c("-122", "37", "-121", "38"))
```


```{r}
# [2]> [4]
is_valid_bbox(c(-122, 38, -121, 37))
```
